title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repository: get up and running with Llama 3.3, Phi-3, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, and list models with a simple API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Bun, Deno, and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package to use Ollama models as LLMs or embedders in LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui (Ollama-WebUI)
summary: Feature-rich web interface for Ollama (ChatGPT-style UI) with multi-user support, model management, and RAG plugins.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by Ollama; use local models as generators or embedders in Haystack NLP pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community cookbook with recipes for function-calling, vision models, RAG, fine-tuning, and more.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store; shows ingestion and Q&A in ~100 lines.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models; supports slash commands and model switching.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds /ollama slash command to query local models right from Slack channels.

title: ollama-cli-tools
summary: Collection of shell scripts to bulk pull, benchmark, and convert models for Ollama.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Custom n8n node to integrate Ollama models into no-code automation workflows.

title: ollama-vscode
summary: VS Code extension that adds “Ask Ollama” command for inline code explanation, generation, and refactoring.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama-dbee
summary: Lightweight TUI (terminal UI) client for Ollama written in Go; supports chats, logs, and model tags.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial Rust crate providing async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Community Elixir client for Ollama with GenServer behavior for streaming chats in Phoenix apps.

title: ollama-rag-langchain
summary: End-to-end RAG template combining Ollama embeddings, LangChain, and Streamlit for PDF Q&A.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Another Slack bot variant using Socket-Mode for secure private deployments; supports mentions and threads.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community Rust CLI that wraps the Ollama REST API with colourful output and progress bars.
